title: Coinbase Rises to 18th in U.S. Equity Trading Volume via Deribit Acquisition
text: Coinbase acquisition of Deribit for $2.9 billion strengthens position as crypto derivatives leader and enables expansion into equity derivatives. Company now ranks 18th in U.S. equity trading volume overall, demonstrating institutional traction. Deribit acquisition contributed $52 million to institutional transaction revenue in latest reporting period. $60 billion in open interest on Deribit platform provides strong foundation for future growth. $1 trillion in annualized trading volume on Deribit demonstrates market opportunity. Integration with Coinbase Prime platform enabling cross-margining across crypto and derivatives markets. Management targeting institutional market as primary growth opportunity with expansion into equity derivatives through Everything Exchange platform. Analyst consensus views derivatives acquisition strategy as critical to achieving recurring revenue targets and reducing earnings volatility.
